page_metadata.biotools__summary: Ultrafast and accurate clustering of phenotypic data of millions of single cells | PARC, “phenotyping by accelerated refined community-partitioning” - is a fast, automated, combinatorial graph-based clustering approach that integrates hierarchical graph construction (HNSW) and data-driven graph-pruning with the new Leiden community-detection algorithm
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Ultrafast and accurate clustering of phenotypic data of millions of single cells | PARC, “phenotyping by accelerated refined community-partitioning” - is a fast, automated, combinatorial graph-based clustering approach that integrates hierarchical graph construction (HNSW) and data-driven graph-pruning with the new Leiden community-detection algorithm
